title: Higher Interest Rates? 3 Insurance Stocks to Consider

title: 7 Stocks to Buy to Beat Next Year's Interest Rate Blues

title: Employee burnout is on par with levels at the height of the COVID-19 pandemic; job performance impacted
text: Aflac study reveals enduring stress and anxiety are affecting U.S. workforce mental health and productivity COLUMBUS, Ga. , Nov. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Due to continued COVID-19 concerns, a sluggish economy and the fear of a potential recession, there is a critical need for mental health care and resources to support employees, according to the nationally representative 12th annual Aflac WorkForces Report.

title: Insurance Behemoth Soars Amid Renewed Market Strength
text: This insurance giant has benefitted from higher prices.

title: Merck, Nike Among 14 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In The Second Half Of November
text: There were a few double-digit boosts in the first half of November. Most notably, ADP came through with a 20% increase and Snap-On Tools with a 14% increase. Emerson extended its dividend growth streak to 66 years with a 1% boost and Lancaster Colony started its 7th decade of dividend growth with a 6% increase.

title: Aflac: Higher Price, But Still Room To Run?
text: Insurance companies can be a great investment for the long run. Aflac has a strong history, both in terms of price appreciation and dividend growth.

title: Aflac and Trupanion Announce Joint Venture - Aflac Pet Insurance in Japan
text: COLUMBUS, Ga. and SEATTLE , Nov. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Aflac Incorporated (NYSE: AFL), a Fortune 500 company that helps protect more than 50 million people in Japan and the United States, and Trupanion, Inc. (Nasdaq: TRUP), a leader in medical insurance for cats and dogs, are announcing a joint venture between Aflac Life Insurance Japan and Trupanion to provide high-value pet insurance in Japan.

title: Insurance ETFs Rallying on Solid Q3 Earnings
text: A slew of solid earnings from the leading players in the insurance industry added to the strength as some of the prominent players surpassed estimates for both earnings and revenues.

title: 7 No-Brainer Dividend Stocks to Buy for 2023 and Beyond

title: Aflac Incorporated to Webcast 2022 Financial Analysts Briefing

title: Aflac Incorporated Announces 5.0% Increase in the First Quarter 2023 Dividend, Increase in Shares Authorized for Repurchase
text: COLUMBUS, Ga. , Nov. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Aflac Incorporated (NYSE: AFL) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared the first quarter dividend of $0.42 per share, payable on March 1, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on February 15, 2023.

title: 7 No-Brainer Stocks to Buy When the Fed Is Hawkish
text: With the Federal Reserve raising the benchmark interest rate again, it's time for investors to target no-brainer stocks to buy that may perform well during a period of monetary tightening. While this ecosystem closes many doors in the equities sector, a few well-positioned firms should do remarkably well.

title: Aflac: Everything Points To Rising Prices
text: Shares of Aflac look to have broken out of a Head & Shoulders continuation pattern. Profitability remains strong, with forward-looking earnings revisions on the rise.

title: Aflac's (AFL) Q3 Earnings Beat on Lower Benefits and Expenses
text: Aflac's (AFL) third-quarter results reflect reduced net benefits and claims, partly offset by lower net investment income and soft revenues in both businesses.
